devsecEpics.name: Endpoint Security Rollout Program
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy SentinelOne to 120 endpoints, including pilot and full rollout.

devsecEpics.name: Cloud CNAPP & Workload Protection Implementation
devsecEpics.desc: Implement CNAPP and deploy agents to 143 workloads for comprehensive protection.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Deployment & Log Onboarding
devsecEpics.desc: Procure and deploy Splunk with prioritized log ingestion for centralized logging.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Deployment & Compliance Enforcement
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy MDM across corporate devices to enforce security policies and compliance.

devsecEpics.name: Build Security Operations Team
devsecEpics.desc: Hire and onboard essential security roles to establish a robust security operations team.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Commercial & Legal Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete the full commercial, financial, and legal procurement cycle for Splunk.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Commercial & Licensing Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete vendor selection and the entire procurement cycle for the MDM solution.

devsecEpics.name: Procurement Governance & Vendor Management
devsecEpics.desc: Establish structured governance for all security tool purchases and vendor management.

devsecEpics.name: Cloudflare WAF Deployment
devsecEpics.desc: Implement and tune WAF protection for critical domains across all brands.

devsecEpics.name: Remove Non-Critical Apps from Public Exposure
devsecEpics.desc: Reduce the external attack surface by removing non-critical applications from public exposure.

devsecEpics.name: Investigate Active Infections & Anomalies (Multi-Cloud)
devsecEpics.desc: Perform deep threat investigation across AWS, GCP, and Cloudflare environments.

devsecEpics.name: Kubernetes Security Posture Review (GKE & AWS)
devsecEpics.desc: Perform comprehensive KSPM review for existing GCP GKE and new AWS Kubernetes clusters.

devsecEpics.name: Post-Migration Security Review (EKS Cluster)
devsecEpics.desc: Perform security validation and hardening of the new AWS EKS cluster post-migration.

devsecEpics.name: Design Kubernetes Cluster Segregation Strategy
devsecEpics.desc: Design architecture for segregating workloads into multiple clusters to reduce blast radius.
